subcodes.first_line: Praise and glory beseem such steadfast souls and mighty hearts whom the swords of the wicked have not [3.5s]... ...Say: O people of God! That which can insure the victory of Him Who is the Eternal Truth, His hosts and helpers on earth, have been set down in the sacred Books and Scriptures… The well-being of mankind, its peace and security, are unattainable
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنا نفوس مطمئنه و افئده قویه را لایق و سزا که سیوف اشرار ایشانرا از
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @power of prayer, @purpose; goal of creation, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @love of God
